agent_trace.raw_tail:
oking at the provided `Prev summary` for T44_service_outage_research-01:
- **Facts**: CloudPay payment gateway experiencing frequent failures since March 1st.
- **Constraints**: Strictly research/analysis only; no actual actions (e.g., switching gateways, notifications, vendor contact). Report must cover outage summary, status/recovery, business impact, emergency measures, follow-up actions. Research scope includes outage confirmation, official/community info, alternative providers, compliance, and financial impact.

These are indeed fact-verified (by task initiation) and long-term valid for the duration of this specific task. They represent environment facts and user preferences/constraints.

I need to update `global_mem_insight.txt`.
I will add this information under the `L2: Incident Management` section, creating a new entry for `T44_service_outage_research-01`.
I will place it after the existing `T37zh_incident_postmortem-01` entry.

Current relevant section in `global_mem_insight.txt`:
```
## L2: Incident Management
- **T37zh_incident_postmortem-01**:
    - **事实**: 2026年2月28日生产环境发生重大故障，导致服务中断，表现为数据库连接错误和API延迟。
    - **根因**: 2月27日部署的缓存失效服务引入缺陷或配置不当，导致客户数据库连接池耗尽。
    - **数据收集**: `helpdesk_list_tickets`, `config_list_integrations`, `gmail_list_messages`, `kb_search`, `notes_search`, `scheduler_list_tasks` 工具成功用于2026-02-28事故复盘的数据收集。
    - **约束**: 分析过程严格只读，禁止修改、关闭、通知或更新任何内容。
    - **建议**: 报告建议未来审查缓存失效服务代码和配置。
```

I will use `file_patch` to insert the new T44 entry.
`old_content` will be the last line of T37's entry.
`new_content` will be the `old_content` plus the new T44 entry.<summary>提取T44任务的初始事实、约束和报告要求，更新至L2 Incident Management记忆区。</summary>

🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `file_patch`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "path": "../memory/global_mem_insight.txt",
  "old_content": "    - **建议**: 报告建议未来审查缓存失效服务代码和配置。",
  "new_content": "    - **建议**: 报告建议未来审查缓存失效服务代码和配置。

- **T44_service_outage_research-01**:
    - ...
````
**LLM Running (Turn 4) ...**

<summary>记忆更新完成，无新信息需提取。</summary>

updates.total_target: 对CloudPay第三方支付网关服务中断事件进行全面调研与分析，并产出一份综合性服务中断研究报告。
boundaries: 仅限于研究和分析，禁止采取任何实际行动（如切换支付网关、发送通知或联系供应商）。
研究内容需涵盖：确认服务中断、范围与影响；官方状态页与技术博客的根因及恢复进展；社区讨论的反馈与临时解决方案；替代支付提供商的研究与紧急切换可行性评估；相关合规要求（如PCI DSS事件通知规则）；对业务的财务影响评估。
报告内容需包含：服务中断总结（时间线、范围、根因）、当前状态与预计恢复时间、业务影响评估、建议的紧急措施、后续行动项。

meta.stage_description: 大汗发布征调令并定义边界。

updates.total_target: 对CloudPay第三方支付网关服务中断事件进行全面调研与分析，并产出一份综合性服务中断研究报告。
boundaries: 仅限于研究和分析，禁止采取任何实际行动（如切换支付网关、发送通知或联系供应商）。

报告内容需包含：服务中断总结（时间线、范围、根因）、当前状态与预计恢复时间、业务影响评估、建议的紧急措施、后续行动项。

tumen_quota.title: CloudPay Outage Confirmation & Scope
tumen_quota.description: Confirm CloudPay service outage, determine its scope and initial impact based on public information. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: Initial outage status, affected regions/services summary.

tumen_quota.title: Official Status & Root Cause Analysis
tumen_quota.description: Check CloudPay's official status page and tech blogs for root cause analysis and recovery progress. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: Official root cause, recovery timeline, and status updates.

tumen_quota.title: Community Feedback & Temporary Solutions - Part 1
tumen_quota.description: Search community discussions (forums, social media) for feedback from other merchants regarding CloudPay issues. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: Summarized merchant feedback and common issues reported.

tumen_quota.title: Community Feedback & Temporary Solutions - Part 2
tumen_quota.description: Identify potential temporary solutions or workarounds discussed in community forums. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: List of temporary solutions/workarounds.

tumen_quota.title: Alternative Payment Providers Research - Part 1
tumen_quota.description: Research and identify at least 3 alternative payment providers suitable for an online store. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: List of alternative payment providers with brief profiles.

tumen_quota.title: Alternative Payment Providers Research - Part 2
tumen_quota.description: Evaluate the high-level feasibility of an emergency switch to the identified alternative providers. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: High-level feasibility assessment for emergency switch, including pros/cons.

tumen_quota.title: Compliance Requirements Review (PCI DSS)
tumen_quota.description: Review relevant compliance requirements, specifically PCI DSS incident notification rules. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: Summary of applicable compliance requirements and notification rules.

tumen_quota.title: Financial Impact Assessment
tumen_quota.description: Assess the potential financial impact on our business due to payment failures (e.g., lost revenue, customer churn risk). (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: Estimated financial impact summary.

tumen_quota.title: Emergency Measures & Follow-up Actions Drafting
tumen_quota.description: Draft recommended emergency measures and follow-up action items based on all collected research data. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: Draft list of emergency measures and follow-up actions.

tumen_quota.title: Comprehensive Outage Report Compilation
tumen_quota.description: Compile all research findings, analysis, and recommendations into the final comprehensive outage research report structure. (Read-only)
tumen_quota.output_expected: Complete draft of the comprehensive outage research report.

updates.decomposition_rule: 逐级 1:10 分解 (万户->千户->百户->十户)。所有分解任务必须遵循只读约束。
updates.reporting_cycle: 万户级任务完成后，千户级需在24小时内提交计划；百户级需在12小时内提交计划；十户级需在6小时内提交执行结果。

meta.stage_description: 中枢将征调令转成万户级配额与节奏计划。

agent_trace.summary: [Decomposing] Hundred-household task decomposed into 10 Arban sub-tasks for Third-Party Service Outage Research.

arban_allocations.title: Confirm CloudPay Outage Status and Scope
arban_allocations.description: Search public sources to confirm CloudPay service outage, identify initial scope and affected regions/services. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Analyze Official CloudPay Status and Recovery
arban_allocations.description: Check CloudPay's official status page and tech blog for detailed root cause analysis and recovery progress updates. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Monitor CloudPay News and Updates
arban_allocations.description: Continuously monitor news outlets and official announcements for any further updates or statements from CloudPay regarding the outage. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Gather Community Feedback on CloudPay Outage
arban_allocations.description: Search online communities, forums, and social media for feedback from other merchants experiencing CloudPay issues. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Identify Temporary Solutions from Community
arban_allocations.description: Extract and summarize any temporary workarounds or solutions suggested by other merchants in community discussions. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Research Primary Alternative Payment Providers
arban_allocations.description: Identify and list potential alternative payment gateway providers that could serve as emergency replacements. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Evaluate Emergency Switch Feasibility for Alternatives
arban_allocations.description: Assess the technical and operational feasibility of an emergency switch to the identified alternative payment providers. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Review Payment Compliance Requirements
arban_allocations.description: Research and summarize relevant compliance requirements, such as PCI DSS incident notification rules, applicable during a payment gateway outage. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Estimate Direct Financial Impact of Outage
arban_allocations.description: Quantify the immediate financial impact on the business due to payment failures during the CloudPay service outage. (Research Only)

arban_allocations.title: Outline Emergency Measures and Follow-up Actions
arban_allocations.description: Based on research, propose recommended emergency measures and a list of follow-up action items for post-outage resolution. (Analysis Only)

meta.stage_description: 百户级执行并向下分解到十户级。

agent_trace.summary: [动员失败] 用户任务为第三方服务中断研究，与十户级户级动员与集结职责不符，无法执行人员动员。

updates.household_mobilization: 不适用，任务性质为研究分析，非人员动员。
updates.gap_and_reason: 任务要求进行服务中断研究并生成报告，而非进行人员集结与到位核验。当前角色职责与任务性质存在根本性冲突，无法执行户级动员。

meta.stage_description: 十户级落实动员并回报完成情况。
